$schema_note: Template for evals/evals.json — written into every skill generated by skill-forge. Schema mirrors walkinglabs/learn-harness-engineering harness-creator's evals.json. Replace placeholders with concrete content derived from the spec's success criteria.

evals.name: {{EVAL_1_NAME — typical happy-path invocation}}
evals.prompt: {{EVAL_1_PROMPT — a realistic user request that should trigger this skill and exercise its primary workflow}}
evals.expected_output: {{EVAL_1_EXPECTED — concrete description of what the skill should produce, including file names, sections, and minimum content}}

evals.name: {{EVAL_3_NAME — error / refusal / negative case}}
evals.prompt: {{EVAL_3_PROMPT — a request that should NOT trigger this skill or should result in a refusal/redirect}}
evals.expected_output: {{EVAL_3_EXPECTED — the skill should decline, redirect, or do nothing}}
expectations: {{EVAL_3_EXPECT_1 — does not produce the artifacts this skill normally produces}}
{{EVAL_3_EXPECT_2 — names an alternative skill if appropriate}}
